params_frozen.design_provenance: Built after v7 FAIL'd 5-phase multi-phase audit on 2026-05-02 (mean αt=+2.60 < 2.86 program-Bonferroni n=14, dispersion 67.2pp > 50pp gate, sign-flip on ivx30+ivp30 across all 5 phases, L/S spread αt=-2.78 confirming Xing 2010 prior IS empirically present in 2024-2026 holdout but train-fitted Lasso learned opposite). v8 removes the optimizer entirely — pure deterministic Xing replication.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro (2026-05-03) ranked 6 v8 redesign axes for HARKing-risk × statistical-power × Bonferroni-cost defensibility. Option E (literature-direct, no model fit) ranked #1: 'No model fitting = no overfitting surface. Pre-reg simply swaps Lasso for deterministic sort.' Verdict reasoning: dispersion likely persists at >60pp because dispersion is orthogonal to direction-correction; v8 may FAIL informatively on dispersion gate even if mean αt clears 2.95. Burnt-holdout policy held — same 2024-04-30 → 2026-04-30 window; window-shopping would be HARKing.
params_frozen.data_provider: iVolatility $399 retail tier (probe v5 99.5% T1 retention)
params_frozen.scoring_rule: score(asof, ticker) = -features.loc[(asof, ticker), 'ivp30']. Higher score → lower 1y-rolling IV-percentile → LOW-IV name → LONG leg per Xing 2010 / Bali-Hovakimian 2009 NEGATIVE-sign prior. No fit, no Lasso, no equity controls in scorer.
params_frozen.scoring_implementation: alphalens.screeners.options_implied.score_literature_direct (NEW v8 module, locked 2026-05-03). 30 LoC, 10 unit tests in tests/test_options_implied_literature_direct.py.
params_frozen.feature_used: ivp30 (1y rolling percentile of IVX30, vendor-precomputed). PIT integrity verified in v7's pit_replication probe (Pearson 0.9990 vs empirical recompute, AAPL n=12 monthly asofs 2023).
features_NOT_used: ivx30 (raw vol level — picking among 4 options features could be HARKing on v7's L/S diagnostic evidence)
reversal_1m / momentum_6m / rv_30d (equity controls — model-free design has no need for them in scoring; their cross-sectional effects fall into HAC residual)
params_frozen.feature_choice_rationale: ivp30 is rank-based (cross-sectionally robust to vol-level outliers) and matches Xing 2010 / Bali 2009 specifications more closely than raw IV level. Locking ivp30 ex-ante by literature citation removes the choice-cardinality concern.

universe_construction.optionable_filter: Same as v7 — smd `optVol > 0 OR (oi_call + oi_put) > 0` on t-1.

delisting_handling.rule: Same as v7 — −50% standard / −100% bankruptcy at terminal bar; mandatory inclusion in cross-section.

params_frozen.fit_strategy: NO FIT — direct Xing 2010 replication. v8 removes the optimizer that created v7's sign-flip surface.
params_frozen.selection_primary: long-only TOP decile EW by score (= LOW-IV names = LONG per Xing). Selection convention identical to v7 amendment 2026-05-02 (LONG TOP decile by raw scorer).
params_frozen.selection_diagnostic_secondary: L/S decile spread (top − bottom by score) reported alongside primary. NOT primary verdict, NOT additional Bonferroni test.
params_frozen.holding_period_rationale: 1d-forward portfolio returns at 5d-stride yield zero overlap → clean Carhart HAC=5 with × 252 annualization. v7 found 20d-forward at 5d-stride created 15d overlap and spuriously inflated αt magnitude — fix carries forward.
params_frozen.cost_rationale: Same as v7 — 30bps RT = 15bps half-spread + 5bps adverse selection × 2 (long-only single-leg).
params_frozen.benchmark: MDY (SPDR S&P MidCap 400 ETF). Same as v7.

phase_a_gates.ivp30_coverage_metric: non-NaN ivp30 / total feature-frame rows on holdout asofs

periods.train_start: N/A — v8 has no train phase
periods.rationale: Same burnt holdout as v7. Per perplexity verdict, shifting windows = window-shopping HARKing. Burnt-holdout escape is prospective replication post-2026-04-30 at unadjusted p<0.05, NOT a different historical window.

secondary_post_hoc.name: sign_constrained_lasso
secondary_post_hoc.framing: EXPLORATORY post-hoc sensitivity, NOT primary, NOT additional Bonferroni test
secondary_post_hoc.description: v7's Lasso re-fit on same train window with non-positive constraint on options-feature coefficients (per Xing prior). Reports whether the 7-feature stack adds incremental Carhart-α beyond raw -ivp30 once sign-flip is mechanically prevented. No verdict computation enters from this — primary verdict is on -ivp30 sort alone. Per perplexity guidance: this is amendment-to-prior, not new-hypothesis.
secondary_post_hoc.defer_rationale: v8 single-phase αt=+2.08 already FAILs program-Bonferroni n=15 (|t|≥2.95). Multi-phase audit pending. If both FAIL, sign-constrained Lasso is moot. If primary PASSes, secondary sensitivity becomes informative.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC=5) on (long-only-top-decile-by-score − MDY-return) holdout series
success_criteria.primary_pass_rule: Holdout single-phase αt ≥ 2.95 AND multi-phase mean(αt) ≥ 2.95 AND phase dispersion < 50pp on excess_net_ann AND ivp30 coverage ≥ 70%
success_criteria.fail_rule: any primary gate misses → FAIL ledger entry, increment program count to n=16, next test |αt|≥3.04

verdict_classification.robust_pass: primary PASS → 'PASS robust to multiplicity; advance to fresh-OOS prospective replication 2026-05-03+'
verdict_classification.fail: any primary gate FAIL → standard FAIL ledger entry

success_criteria.no_stretch_tier: v7's Romano-Wolf stretch flag (m=30) is dropped in v8. Single PASS bar simplifies the verdict surface and reduces the choice-cardinality space. Bonferroni naive n=15 is the only threshold.
success_criteria.regime_stratification_postdoc: DESCRIPTIVE: report holdout αt and excess vs MDY split by VIX>20 vs VIX<20 sub-periods. Not a gate.
success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy OFF-TABLE on this burnt holdout regardless of any verdict per program-level burnt-holdout policy. PASS triggers prospective walk-forward replication on data accruing post-2026-04-30 at unadjusted p<0.05 single-test before any escalation.
